params_used.custom_text: // This module compares two 12-bit inputs, A and B, and outputs two single-bit signals: GT (Greater Than) and LT (Less Than). When A is less than B, the GT output will be high (1), and the LT output will be low (0). Conversely, when A is greater than B, the LT output will be high (1), and the GT output will be low (0).
